TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tabilas, title = Tabilas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tabilas} }

S.FORM: Tabilas Itiniay i Tai'an Cen no Miaoli ko Tabilas a niyaro', 115 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 361 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 81% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 292 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 19% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 69 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal75%, Amis1%, Saysiyat1%, Bunun2%, Paiwan2%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tab~b~viɾas itiniaj i taiʡan ʦən no~u miao~uɾi ko~u tab~b~viɾas a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, sajsijat*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Tabilas Itiniay i Tai'an Cen no Miaoli ko Tabilas a niyaro', 115 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 361 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 81% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 292 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 19% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 69 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal75%, Amis1%, Saysiyat1%, Bunun2%, Paiwan2%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tab~b~viɾas itiniaj i taiʡan ʦən no~u miao~uɾi ko~u tab~b~viɾas a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, sajsijat*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
